title: Game HUD Panel Redesign — 5-Tab CEO Command Center
description: Replace the 3-tab HUD (Team/Decisions/Reports) with 5 purpose-built tabs: Team (activity feed), Inbox (actionable items), Projects (drill-down navigator), Intel (full report browser), Wiki (knowledge browser). Every tab supports progressive disclosure.

in: 5-tab header: Team, Inbox, Projects, Intel, Wiki
Type system updates across GameHeader, GamePage, SidePanel, types.ts
Team panel polish: activity-first with task names and time elapsed
Inbox panel: rename from Decisions with context
Projects panel: new drill-down Goals > Projects > Tasks
Intel panel: new full report browser replacing Reports
out: Custom pixel-art fonts or sprite assets
New API endpoints or store changes

tasks.title: Update HUD types and header buttons for 5-tab system
tasks.scope: Update HudPanel, HudTab, TileType for 5 tabs. Update GameHeader buttons with icons. Update SidePanel and GamePage mappings.

dod.criterion: HudPanel and HudTab types include all 5 tabs
GameHeader renders 5 HudButtons with correct icons
TileType includes hud-team, hud-inbox, hud-projects, hud-intel, hud-wiki
SidePanel and GamePage mappings updated
TypeScript compiles

tasks.title: Wire SidePanel content routing for 5 tabs
tasks.scope: Update PanelContent to route all 5 tabs. Import new panel components (stub if needed). Tab strip renders all 5.

dod.criterion: PanelContent routes all 5 tab values
Tab strip renders 5 tabs
App compiles and each button shows corresponding tab

tasks.title: Polish Team panel activity-first layout
tasks.scope: Show full task name, add time-since-started for working agents. Core layout already correct.

dod.criterion: Working agents show full task name
Working agent cards show time-since-started
Idle agents in compact grid
Renders correctly with 0 active agents

tasks.title: Build Inbox panel (rename from Decisions)
tasks.scope: Create InboxPanel.tsx from DecisionsPanel. Rename, update empty state. Export from index.ts.

dod.criterion: InboxPanel.tsx exists and exports from panels/index.ts
Shows approvals, errors, waiting-input with context
Routed correctly from SidePanel tab

tasks.title: Build Projects drill-down panel
tasks.scope: Create ProjectsPanel.tsx with 3-level drill-down: goals -> projects -> tasks. Uses workState from store. Back button. Parchment styling.

dod.criterion: ProjectsPanel.tsx exists and exports from panels/index.ts
Goal list shows all goals with status and project counts
Clicking a goal shows its projects with progress
Back button works at each level
Handles empty state

tasks.title: Build Intel panel (full report browser)
tasks.scope: Create IntelPanel.tsx. All reports chronological + detail view via artifact-content API. Active directive section. Back button.

dod.criterion: IntelPanel.tsx exists and exports from panels/index.ts
Shows ALL reports, not limited to 5
Click loads and displays full content
Back button returns to list
Active directive progress shown if exists

tasks.title: Build Wiki panel (lessons knowledge browser)
tasks.scope: Create WikiPanel.tsx. Topic list from workState.conductor.lessons + detail view via artifact-content API. Back button.

dod.criterion: WikiPanel.tsx exists and exports from panels/index.ts
Shows all lesson topics from store
Click loads and displays full content
Back button returns to list
Handles empty state

tasks.title: Remove old DecisionsPanel and ReportsPanel references
tasks.scope: Remove old panels if unused. Update index.ts exports. Clean imports. Remove old tile types.

dod.criterion: No imports of old panels remain
index.ts exports new panels
No old hud-decisions/hud-reports references
TypeScript compiles clean
5 header buttons: Team, Inbox, Projects, Intel, Wiki
Each tab shows real data from dashboard store
Projects tab drills down Goals > Projects > Tasks with back button
Intel tab shows ALL reports with click-to-read and back
Wiki tab shows all lessons with click-to-read and back
No dead code from old 3-tab system
